name: Velveeta Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and Velveeta cheese in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Sift together the powdered sugar, cocoa, vanilla, and chopped nuts (if using) into a separate bowl.
3. Gradually add the melted cheese mixture to the sifted dry ingredients, stirring constantly until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture evenly into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan or an 11 x 16-inch jelly roll pan.
5. Allow the fudge to cool completely.
6. Once cooled, use a sharp knife to cut the fudge into pieces.
Makes about 6 1/2 pounds.
